description: auto QA trigger for copilot-auto-qa workflow

name: qa-force-regenerate
description: Force re-generation of QA questionnaire even if existing QA files are detected.

name: qa-questionnaire-pr
description: QA 質問票専用 PR（メインタスク用 auto-qa PR には自動付与されない。専用 PR は本文先頭に <!-- qa-questionnaire-pr: opt-in --> を記載すること）

description: trigger Sub Issue creation from subissues.md in PR

name: split-mode
description: split mode PR (copilot-instructions.md §2 SPLIT_REQUIRED)

name: plan-only
description: PR contains only plan.md and subissues.md (no implementation files)

name: auto-app-documentation
description: run source code documentation workflow (multi-layer doc generation from codebase)

name: original-docs-review
description: run original docs review workflow (cross-analysis questionnaire generation)

name: auto-approve-ready
description: trigger auto-approve and auto-merge for PR (added by orchestrators when auto-merge is enabled)
